hero.title: DISCORD BOT FOR EVERYTHING YOU NEED
hero.description: A powerful multi-tool bot with moderation, music, economy, leveling and more. Free, fast, and built for communities of any size.

features.heading: EVERYTHING IN ONE BOT
features.subheading: Replace 10 bots with one. Built for power, designed for simplicity.

items.title: High Quality Music
items.description: Crystal clear playback from YouTube, Spotify, SoundCloud with filters and queues.

items.title: Auto Moderation
items.description: Anti-spam, anti-raid, word filters and customizable punishments out of the box.

items.title: Economy System
items.description: Currency, shops, gambling, jobs and leaderboards to keep members engaged.

items.title: Leveling & XP
items.description: Voice and text XP with role rewards and rank cards your members will love.

items.title: Ticket Support
items.description: Beautiful ticket panels with transcripts, claiming and category routing.

items.title: Giveaways
items.description: Run giveaways with requirements, bonus entries and instant rerolls.

items.title: AI Chat
items.description: Built-in AI assistant for your members with custom personalities.

items.title: Full Dashboard
items.description: Configure every module from a sleek web dashboard, no commands required.

premium.heading: GO PREMIUM
premium.subheading: Unlock the full potential with premium perks.

commands.heading: 120+ COMMANDS
commands.subheading: A snapshot of what you can do.

items.desc: Play a song or playlist from any source
Ban a member from the server
Timeout a member for a set duration
Bulk delete messages in a channel
Browse and buy items from the shop
Try your luck at the casino

cta.heading: READY TO LEVEL UP YOUR SERVER?
cta.description: Join over a million communities using NOVA every day.

footer.description: The all-in-one Discord bot built for modern communities.
